question_X: Are you employed?
Is your new job going well?
question_X_cz: Jde ti to v nové práci dobře?
answer_Y_cz: To, co dělám, mě hrozně baví.

question_X: Do you want to have a BBQ this evening?
Did you drive straight here?
answer_Y: I had to stop at my mom's house.
answer_Y_cz: Musel jsem se ještě stavit u mámy.

question_X: Do you still like hiking?
answer_Y: I still try to hit the trails at least once a month.
answer_Y_cz: Snažím se vyrazit na hory aspoň jednou za měsíc.

question_X: Do you go bar hoping often?
Was the travel tiring?
Do you enjoy living out of town?
answer_Y: I love living in the countryside.

question_X: Looking forward to this weekend?
Did you bring everything you need?
answer_Y: I didn't have enough space for everything
question_X_cz: Vzal jsi si všechno, co potřebuješ?
answer_Y_cz: Všechno se mi do kufru nevešlo.

question_X: Do you want to look through the museum?
answer_Y: Can we go to the park instead?
answer_Y_cz: Nemohli bychom jít radši do parku?

question_X: Would you like to go to the movies tonight?
question_X_cz: Nechtěl bys jít dneska večer do kina?

question_X: Want to go see a movie?
Do you want to go to the mall?
Do you want to go sightseeing this weekend?
question_X_cz: Chceš jít o víkendu po památkách?

question_X: Did you sleep on your way here?
Have you taken any big vacations lately?
answer_Y: I went to Europe for 3 weeks last fall.
question_X_cz: Byl jsi v poslední době na nějaké velké dovolené?
answer_Y_cz: Loni na podzim jsem byl na tři týdny v Evropě.

question_X: Would you like to pet my dog?
Have you seen my new place before?
question_X_cz: Už jsi někdy viděl moje nové bydlení?

question_X: Are you relieved to get some time away?
question_X_cz: Ulevilo se ti, že sis dal na chvíli od všeho pohov?

question_X: Do you want to catch a Christmas movie later?
question_X_cz: Mrkneme pak na nějaký vánoční film?

question_X: Are you doing well?
Would  you  like to see the sights?
question_X_cz: Chceš se jít podívat na památky?

question_X: Do you want to play some videogames?
answer_Y: I have epilepsy and can't look at rapidly moving graphics.
answer_Y_cz: Mám epilepsii a nemůžu se dívat na rychle se měnící obraz.

question_X: Would you be interested in seeing a comedy show?
question_X_cz: Měl bys zájem zajít na nějakou komedii?

question_X: Are you watching any new TV shows?
answer_Y_cz: Teď ujíždím na Úžasné paní Maiselové.

question_X: do you have any places in mind you want to go?
answer_Y: I really want to see the newest art exhibitions.
question_X_cz: Máš v hlavě nějaká místa, kam bys chtěl zajít?
answer_Y_cz: Moc rád bych viděl ty nejnovější umělecké výstavy.

question_X: Have you seen that new movie?
Do you want to look through the museum?
answer_Y: Let's check out the ancient Egypt exhibit.
answer_Y_cz: Pojďme se podívat na tu výstavu o starověkém Egyptě.

question_X: Do you want to change before we go out to dinner?
answer_Y: I'm comfortable in what I have on.

question_X: Want to eat at a restaurant?
answer_Y: I'd love to go out for Italian.
answer_Y_cz: Moc rád bych zašel na italskou kuchyni.

question_X: Are you ready for some food?
answer_Y: I've been thinking about your secret brownie recipe all day.
answer_Y_cz: Celý den myslím na ten tvůj tajný recept na brownies.

question_X: Do you find the weather pleasant?
Shall we going shopping?
Do you like Country side?
answer_Y: The air smells a lot better.
answer_Y_cz: Ten vzduch je tam mnohem lepší.

question_X: Do you want to change before we go out to dinner?
answer_Y: I'll just go as I am

question_X: You have any change of clothes?
answer_Y: I have everything I need in my overnight bag.
answer_Y_cz: Všechno, co potřebuju, mám v téhle tašce.

question_X: Did you stop anywhere on the way?
Would you like to meet up with our old friends?
answer_Y: It would be great to catch up with them.
question_X_cz: Chtěl bys vidět naše staré známé?
answer_Y_cz: Bylo by super s nimi probrat, co je nového.

question_X: Do you want some time on your own to explore?
question_X_cz: Chceš chvíli čas pro sebe na průzkum?

question_X: Are you leaving tomorrow?
answer_Y: We are going to the comedy show tomorrow, remember?
answer_Y_cz: Zítra přece jdeme na tu komedii, pamatuješ?

question_X: Can we go for a walk?
answer_Y: I love walking around in the city.
answer_Y_cz: Moc rád se procházím po městě.

question_X: Do you feel like going for a long walk tomorrow?
answer_Y: A walk outside would be refreshing.
question_X_cz: Máš zítra chuť na delší procházku?

question_X: Are you leaving tomorrow?
answer_Y: I'm staying here for two weeks

question_X: Have you tried Sweetish Hill on 6th yet?
answer_Y: Oh that sounds like a place I would like to try.
question_X_cz: Už jsi zkusil tu Sweetish Hill na Šesté?
answer_Y_cz: To zní jako místo, které bych rád vyzkoušel.

question_X: Are you staying in a hotel?
answer_Y: I am for the time being

question_X: Are you up for a hike tomorrow morning?
question_X_cz: Šel bys zítra ráno na túru?

question_X: Was the trip good?
answer_Y: The trip was short and sweet!
answer_Y_cz: Byla sice krátká, ale stála za to!

question_X: Are you still engaged?
answer_Y: She broke off our engagement last month.

question_X: Was your flight nonstop?
answer_Y: I had a two hour layover.

question_X: Are you ready to have fun?
Is your new job going well?
question_X_cz: Jde ti to v nové práci dobře?

question_X: Do you fancy a drink after your long journey?
question_X_cz: Nedáš si po té dlouhé cestě drink?

question_X: Are you willing to visit a museum with me?
answer_Y: I'd like to see the new exhibit at the art museum.
question_X_cz: Chtěla bys se mnou zajít do muzea?
answer_Y_cz: Ráda bych viděla tu novou výstavu v galerii.

question_X: Do you know much about this town?
answer_Y_cz: Jenom to, cos mi řekl ty.
